intent: 1BR / 1 bath wide LDK smoke test, no carport. 11x8 lot gives a 7x4 envelope = 28 m2 floor -- the LDK sibling of 1s_1br_wd_split_wing_bath_gr, which stays compact-only (min is always the gr topology's job; this ldk sibling is infeasible at the gr topology's 10x8 canonical). West wet column (bath front/kitchen rear) unchanged from the gr sibling; middle column now stacks living (front, hosts entry) + dining (rear) instead of one great_room, mirroring the west column's own front/rear split -- dining ends up beside kitchen, living beside bath. Bedroom's door is hinged at the rear end (door_placement: high_corner), matching the gr sibling's fix.
must_haves: bath door opens into living, not kitchen
living and dining stacked front-to-rear, hosting the entry
